title: pogostemon tetraphyllus
intro: Pogostemon tetraphyllus, also known as Patchouli, is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant's leaves and stems contain essential oils with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pogostemon tetraphyllus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of eczema and acne, among others. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used for topical application, aromatherapy, or internal consumption, depending on the desired health benefit.
